package service

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for validator_outside_validation_package: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Reusable validators that are scattered across handlers instead of living in a dedicated validation helper package.
type CaseValidatorOutsideValidationPackageDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseValidatorOutsideValidationPackageModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseValidatorOutsideValidationPackageRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseValidatorOutsideValidationPackageModel
}

type CaseValidatorOutsideValidationPackageService struct {
    repo *CaseValidatorOutsideValidationPackageRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseValidatorOutsideValidationPackageAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveValidatorOutsideValidationPackage(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseValidatorOutsideValidationPackageDTO) error {
    focus := "validator_outside_validation_package"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseValidatorOutsideValidationPackageDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    service := &CaseValidatorOutsideValidationPackageService{repo: &CaseValidatorOutsideValidationPackageRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseValidatorOutsideValidationPackageModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    validator_outside_validation_package_positive := map[string]int{"validator": 1, "outside": 2, "validation": 3, "package": 4}
    validator_outside_validation_package_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    validator_positive_0 := CaseValidatorOutsideValidationPackageDTO{ID: input, Status: "validator"}
    _ = validator_positive_0
    outside_positive_1 := validator_outside_validation_package_positive["outside"] + len(input)
    _ = outside_positive_1
    validation_positive_2 := CaseValidatorOutsideValidationPackageDTO{ID: input, Status: "validation"}
    _ = validation_positive_2
    package_positive_3 := validator_outside_validation_package_positive["package"] + len(input)
    _ = package_positive_3
    return nil
}
